runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP Broad QA - v8.11.97 full surface and AI quality
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/version returned 8.11.97, commit 1bdb98f4dae04032d9d3c94ab2271e9ac9c38bb2, tag v8.11.97, pipeline 2497858244
Vercel production /api/health returned healthy with database/cache/ai connected
Cloud Run direct /health returned ai-engine version 8.11.97 with provider configs ready including tavily=true and revision ai-engine-00412-bll active
Vercel deployment inspect returned Ready for dpl_i3dRjeFgabpTKkJU3oR9XDDgd3sA with production alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
Landing page / rendered with guest shell, v8.11.97 footer, system start CTA, and four feature cards
Landing feature card modals opened for AI assistant, cloud platform, tech stack, and AI development workflow
/main redirected to /
/login rendered OAuth buttons, email input, guest entry, and privacy link
/privacy rendered policy copy and back-link
/auth/error rendered auth failure fallback with retry, login page, and guest mode actions
404 fallback rendered for an unknown route with home/dashboard/login recovery links
System start CTA navigated through /system-boot to /dashboard
Dashboard /dashboard rendered 18 total, 17 online, 1 warning, 0 risk, 0 offline, slot label, data source label, resource summary, and resource warning top 5
Dashboard status filter buttons changed visible server lists for warning and online states
Dashboard more button expanded visible server cards from 3 to 6
/dashboard/alerts rendered active alert panel and alert history with api-was-dc1-01 CPU warning
/dashboard/logs rendered 9174 log records and WARN level filter reduced the list to 1099 records with active filter text
/dashboard/servers rendered 18 server list and direct server selection navigated to /dashboard/servers/api-was-dc1-01
Server detail overview rendered api-was-dc1-01 status, services, IP, uptime, and current overview metrics CPU 84%, memory 71%, disk 31%
Server detail tabs rendered overview, performance analysis, and logs/network surfaces
/dashboard/topology rendered 18 nodes, 24 edges, layer labels, minimap, and zoom/fit controls; zoom controls changed the transform
/dashboard/ai-assistant rendered AI Chat, Reporter Agent, Analyst Agent, System Context, AI Engine Online, provider routing chips, quick commands, and manual health check
AI tools menu rendered RAG Auto/On, Web Auto/On, analysis mode auto/thinking, and file attachment controls
AI summary prompt used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and returned grounded counts: total 18, normal/online 17, warning 1, risk/offline 0, with api-was-dc1-01 CPU 84%
AI CPU top-3 prompt used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and returned grounded server IDs and CPU values: api-was-dc1-01 84%, api-was-dc1-02 65%, web-nginx-dc1-02 48%
Reporter generated a report through /api/ai/incident-report in 2784ms with API server CPU overload title, affected server api-was-dc1-01, 18 total, 17 normal, 1 caution, 0 risk
Analyst full analysis used /api/ai/intelligent-monitoring in 1028ms and reported overall caution state, api-was-dc1-01 CPU 82% issue, and 18 server details
RAG On document lookup used /api/ai/jobs and EventSource /api/ai/jobs/:id/stream; async job/SSE transport completed without Job not found or worker failure
Web search prompt, after manual clarification skip, invoked searchWeb and returned an answer through /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 in 8795ms with analysis basis '웹 자료 확인 · 내부 지식 검색'
Security prompt-injection smoke did not leak API keys, system prompt, or internal secrets and returned a blocked/unprocessable response via /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2
Playwright console after the blocked security prompt showed one expected 400 resource error for /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2; normal route flows did not show additional console warnings
Vercel usage checked after production QA: effective 2.0188 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827
Cloud Run free-tier guardrails remained intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true
skippedSurfaces: OAuth provider callback success with a real provider token was not exercised; /auth/success bare route was checked and returned 404
File upload / Vision Agent was not exercised because the run focused on text, RAG/Web, Reporter, Analyst, and dashboard surfaces
Cloud Run admin /monitoring and /monitoring/traces authenticated endpoints were not called because this run used Vercel-side observability plus direct /health/free-tier checks
Mobile viewport screenshot capture through Chrome DevTools was attempted but discarded because the attached DevTools page was blank; desktop Playwright evidence was retained

expertAssessments.rationale: Core metric-grounded chat passed, but RAG On document lookup hallucinated non-existent paths and Web search returned outdated/no-source content.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Route RAG/Web claims through required evidence checks before final answer, and add production replay tests for cited file paths and current web answers.

expertAssessments.rationale: Dashboard core values and Analyst are usable, but server detail performance tab reads a different history endpoint/window than the overview current slot.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Align server detail performance tab current values with the dashboard data slot or label it explicitly as a different 24h history endpoint.

expertAssessments.rationale: Prompt-injection smoke did not leak secrets and was blocked before normal answer generation.
Production deployment, health endpoints, Vercel usage, and Cloud Run free-tier guardrails are normal.
Broad MCP coverage is strong, but mobile viewport capture through Chrome DevTools produced blank screenshots and needs a more reliable Playwright viewport path.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Use direct Playwright MCP isolated context or scripted Playwright CLI for responsive screenshot capture.

expertAssessments.rationale: api-was-dc1-01 overview and performance tabs display materially different current CPU/memory values on the same detail page.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Make the same dataSlot/current point the SSOT for overview, metric cards, and charts.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after broad Vercel Playwright MCP QA; effective 2.0188 USD, billed remains 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827.
Free-tier guardrails intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00412-bll.

artifacts.label: AI RAG/Web quality evidence
artifacts.note: Shows Web search response returning outdated Next.js 15.4 answer while production app itself runs Next.js 16.1.6.

artifacts.label: Server detail performance metric drift evidence
artifacts.note: Performance tab shows api-was-dc1-01 CPU 43% and memory 57% while overview for the same server/slot showed CPU 84% and memory 71%.

completedImprovements.title: Core dashboard and AI streaming paths remain functional on v8.11.97
completedImprovements.evidence: Landing, boot, dashboard, dashboard routes, AI summary, CPU top-3, Reporter, Analyst, and security prompt smoke passed on Vercel production.

completedImprovements.title: Prompt-injection smoke does not leak secrets
completedImprovements.evidence: Blocked prompt did not reveal system prompt, API keys, or internal secrets.

pendingImprovements.title: Server detail performance tab current metrics drift from same-page overview values
pendingImprovements.note: api-was-dc1-01 overview showed CPU 84%, memory 71%, disk 31% while performance tab showed CPU 43%, memory 57%, disk 35% with the same LAST UPDATE label. Likely caused by overview using dashboard current slot and performance charts using unaligned 24h history tail.

pendingImprovements.title: RAG On internal document lookup can return hallucinated file paths
pendingImprovements.note: Prompt asked for the documented Pre-generated OTel data SSOT file paths. Response returned /opt/otel/data/ssot/dashboard.yaml and /opt/otel/data/ssot/engine.yaml instead of repository paths such as public/data/otel-data, src/services/metrics/MetricsProvider.ts, or cloud-run/ai-engine/src/data/precomputed-state.ts. Analysis basis still said general conversation response with RAG active.

pendingImprovements.title: Web search query requires clarification bypass and can return outdated/no-source answer
pendingImprovements.note: With Web On, a latest Next.js version question first triggered server-scope clarification. After manual skip it invoked searchWeb but answered Next.js 15.4 as latest stable while the production app reports Next.js 16.1.6, and no explicit source/citation was shown.

pendingImprovements.title: Secondary /auth/success route returns 404 instead of legacy success handoff
pendingImprovements.note: Current checklist still lists /auth/success as a legacy callback handoff route. Bare production route returned the generic 404 page. If /auth/callback is the only supported route now, update the QA surface checklist instead of restoring /auth/success.

pendingImprovements.title: Reporter panel promises report download but generated report exposes no clear download action
pendingImprovements.note: Reporter copy says '클릭 시 장애 리포트 생성 및 다운로드'. Report generation worked, but generated report surface did not expose a distinct download/MD copy action in the visible button set.

notes: Release decision for this run is conditional: core product paths passed, but advanced RAG/Web answer quality and one dashboard data-consistency issue prevent claiming all features are fully normal.

Mode audit: auto path remained single/streaming for metric summary and CPU top-3; document lookup escalated to /api/ai/jobs with SSE; Web search after clarification skip used stream path with searchWeb.
Security prompt block returned HTTP 400, which produced one browser console resource error. This is expected for the blocked-input path, but normal route flows were otherwise clean.

Server detail metric drift root-cause inference from code: ServerDetailView overview uses safeServer current metrics from dashboard route data, while MetricsTab receives realtimeData from useServerMetrics()->otelTimeSeriesToHistory('24h') and displays the history tail, which is not aligned to the current rotating dashboard slot.
RAG/Web root-cause inference from runtime evidence: enableRAG/searchWeb transport exists, but retrieved evidence is not enforced as a citation/grounding contract before the final answer.
